title: Cabbage's Retro Generator
description: Adds a world preset for generating beta 1.7.3 terrain
body:
## Description
A simple mod, attempts to generate beta terrain as accurately as possible, the one exception is the world height which I increased to 256. 
## Screen Shots
![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/8RjbGGoC/images/d4736ed9fedca1bd76b1b76728fb532603442c24.png)
